overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing a character riding a mechanical Sunwing mount low over ocean water, transitioning from open sea to coastal ruins and tropical islands with ancient stone structures under a bright partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ocean with distant tropical coastline

agents.ego_description: character riding a mechanical Sunwing mount low over the ocean waves, maintaining steady altitude while heading toward the distant coastline

entered.detail: deep blue ocean water stretching to the horizon
rocky coastline with palm trees visible in the distance
fluffy white clouds scattered across the blue sky
palm trees and greenery lining the distant shore
gentle waves and ripples on the water surface below

segments.scene_description: Flying low over open ocean water with a distant tropical coastline visible to the left. The mechanical Sunwing mount glides smoothly above the gentle waves under a bright partly cloudy sky, with palm trees visible on the distant shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal shallows with ancient stone ruins

events.description: water transitions from deep blue open ocean to turquoise coastal shallows
approaching ancient stone arch bridge and coastal ruins on the left

agents.ego_description: flying over shallow turquoise waters while approaching the coastline, banking slightly left toward ancient stone structures

entered.detail: crystal clear shallow water revealing the sandy bottom below
ancient stone bridge with archway spanning the water
weathered stone ruins and structures along the coastline
white sandy beach curving along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The mount flies over crystal-clear turquoise shallows as the coastline draws near. Ancient stone ruins and a prominent stone arch bridge come into view on the left, while white sandy beaches appear on the right. The water transitions from deep blue to transparent turquoise.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical island with ancient ruins and tall tower landmark

events.description: flying over the stone arch bridge and transitioning from water to land
ancient ruins and massive tall tower structure become prominent ahead

agents.ego_description: ascending slightly while flying over the tropical island landscape, passing ancient ruins and approaching a massive tall tower structure in the distance

entered.detail: massive ancient spire or tower rising above the island in the distance

segments.scene_description: The mount soars over the tropical island interior, passing directly over ancient stone ruins and dense vegetation. Having crossed the stone arch bridge, the landscape opens to reveal a massive tall tower structure dominating the distant skyline ahead, with sandy beaches visible below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight over the ocean that transitions from the open sea into the heart of a tropical island filled with ancient ruins. It begins with a mechanical Sunwing gliding low over deep blue waves under a bright, partly cloudy sky, with a distant coastline of palm trees visible to the left. As the mount draws closer to the shore, the water shifts from deep blue to transparent turquoise shallows, revealing white sandy beaches and a prominent stone arch bridge. The scene then expands as the camera soars over the island's interior, passing directly over dense vegetation and weathered stone ruins. Finally, the landscape opens up to reveal a massive, towering structure dominating the distant skyline as the mount continues its flight inland.
